fields.explainEn: Data backup directory for the backint.

fields.explainZh: backint可执行文件的真实文件名。
fields.explainEn: Backint executable file name.

fields.explainZh: backint可执行文件的链接名称。
fields.explainEn: Backint executable link name.

fields.explainZh: 基于文件的数据备份的默认目录。
fields.explainEn: Default directory for file-based data backups.

fields.explainZh: 基于文件的日志备份的当前目录。
fields.explainEn: Current directory for file-based log backups.

fields.explainZh: 以字节为单位记录重播步长。
fields.explainEn: Log replay step size in bytes.

fields.explainZh: 恢复期间每个请求的并行backint通道的最大数量。
fields.explainEn: Maximum number of parallel backint channels per request during recovery.
Maximum recovery file age.
Size of the backup.

fields.explainZh: 分别指定数据备份或日志备份的唯一标识。
fields.explainEn: Unique ID of a data backup or a log backup, respectively.

fields.explainZh: 指定备份目录条目的分类，支持以下类型：完整的数据备份、数据快照、日志备份、缺少日志、差异备份、增量备份。
fields.explainEn: Classification of backup catalog entries. Supported types are complete data backup, data snapshot, log backup, log missing, differential, and incremental backups.
Type of database service. Options are indexserver, nameserver, and statisticsserver.

fields.explainZh: 指要备份的持久性类型：VOLUME，TOPOLOGY。
fields.explainEn: Type of persistence to be backed up. Options are VOLUME and TOPOLOGY.
Backup status during collection.
Backup end time.
Backup start time.
Blocked timestamp.

fields.explainZh: 等待锁的事务的事务对象ID。
fields.explainEn: Transaction object ID of the transaction waiting for a lock.
Lock mode. Options are SHARED, EXCLUSIVE,INTENTIONAL and EXCLUSIVE.

fields.explainZh: 持有锁的交易的交易对象ID。
fields.explainEn: Transaction object ID of the transaction holding the lock.
Lock type. Options are RECORD, TABLE, and METADATA.
Blocked SQL statement.
Name of the schema on which the lock is currently placed.

fields.explainZh: 当前放置锁的对象的名称。
fields.explainEn: Name of the object on which the lock is currently placed.
HANA database connection status.
Total number of connections.
Instance name of the SAP HANA database.
Version of the SAP HANA database.
Allocation limit for all processes.

fields.explainZh: 主机上的可用物理内存。
fields.explainEn: Free physical memory on the host.

fields.explainZh: 所有SAP HANA进程的内存池大小。
fields.explainEn: Amount of memory from the memory pool that is currently being used by SAP HANA processes.
Host name.
Total physical memory on the host.

fields.explainZh: 在主机上使用物理内存。
fields.explainEn: Used physical memory on the host.
Swap memory on the host.

fields.explainZh: 在主机上使用交换内存。
fields.explainEn: Used swap memory on the host.
Code and stack size.
Physical resident memory size.
Host name.

fields.explainZh: 用于各种数据变更操作所产生的二进制日志信息的缓存区大小。
fields.explainEn: Size of the cache for binary log information generated upon various data changes.

fields.explainZh: 分别指定数据备份和日志备份的唯一ID，单个数据备份的所有备份文件共享相同的backup_ID。
fields.explainEn: Unique ID of a data backup and log backup respectively. All backup files of a single data backup share the same BACKUP_ID.
Type of location. Options are file and BACKINT.

fields.explainZh: 指定备份目录条目的分类，支持以下类型：完整的数据备份、数据快照、日志备份、缺少日志、差异备份、增量备份。
fields.explainEn: Classification of backup catalog entries. Supported types are complete data backup, data snapshot, log backup, log missing, differential, and incremental backups.
Backup end time.
Backup start time.

fields.explainZh: 属性包括：实例标识、实例编号、分布式、版本、操作系统平台、全部启动。
fields.explainEn: Supported attributes include instance ID, instance number, distributed, version, operating system platform, and start all.

fields.explainZh: 上述属性对应的结果，释义分别为:实例标识、实例编号、是否为分布式、HANA数据库的版本、操作系统平台、是否全部启动。
fields.explainEn: Results of the previous attributes, including instance ID, instance number, whether it is distributed, HANA database version, operating system platform, whether to start all.
Column table size.
Number of column tables.
Number of row tables.
Row table size.
Schema name.

fields.explainZh: 当前进程的活跃请求数。
fields.explainEn: Number of active requests for the process.
Active status.

fields.explainZh: 当前进程的活跃线程数。
fields.explainEn: Number of active threads for the process.
Coordinator type in the distributed landscape. Options include MASTER, SLAVE, STANDBY, and NONE.
Host name.
Service port number.

fields.explainZh: 主机名称与端口的字符串拼接，该指标组中数据的唯一标识。
fields.explainEn: Combination of the host name and port number, which is the unique identifier for index group data.
Number of opened files.

fields.explainZh: 当前进程的等待请求数。
fields.explainEn: Number of waiting requests of the process.

fields.explainZh: 当前进程物理内存使用情况。
fields.explainEn: Physical memory usage of the process.
CPU usage of the process.
Number of requests per second.
Request response time.
Service name of the HANA database.
Total number of transactions.
HANA database transaction status.

fields.explainZh: 当前语句每分钟提交数。
fields.explainEn: Number of commits per minute for the current statement.

fields.explainZh: 当前语句每分钟编译数。
fields.explainEn: Number of compilations per minute for the current statement.

fields.explainZh: 当前语句每分钟执行次数。
fields.explainEn: Number of executions per minute for the current statement.

fields.explainZh: 每分钟使用内存的总大小。
fields.explainEn: Total size of used memory per minute.

fields.explainZh: 当前语句每分钟回滚数。
fields.explainEn: Number of rollbacks per minute for the current statement.

fields.explainZh: 当前语句每分钟更新事务数。
fields.explainEn: Number of updated transactions per minute for the current statement.
Host name.
Service port number.

fields.explainZh: 主机名称与端口的字符串拼接，该指标组中数据的唯一标识。
fields.explainEn: Combination of the host name and port number, which is the unique identifier for index group data.

fields.explainZh: 测试IP对应资源的协议连接。
fields.explainEn: Test the protocol connections of the resource corresponding to an IP address.
